title: Sour Flaky Thai Sweet Potatoes Stir-fry
description: This indulgent dish features sweet potatoes fried until crispy and mixed with a tangy sauce to make a perfect side or main course.

ingredients.name: Sweet Potatoes
ingredients.notes: Peel and slice into thin pieces

ingredients.name: Thai Chilies
ingredients.notes: Choose mild to hot depending on preference

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Light soy for a touch of umami but less salty

ingredients.name: Fish Sauce
ingredients.notes: Classic Thai ingredient adds depth to the dish

ingredients.name: Sugar
ingredients.notes: To balance the sourness and enhance sweetness

instructions: Slice sweet potatoes into thin, uniform rounds.
In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce, fish sauce, white vinegar, and sugar. Stir until the sugar is fully dissolved.
Add sliced red peppers and Thai chilies to your air fryer basket with prepped sweet potato pieces. Toss to coat evenly.
Pour the marinade mixture over the vegetables and sweet potatoes, ensuring they are well coated.
Air fry for 15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy. Shake basket halfway through cooking time for even browning.
Transfer the stir-fried dish onto a serving plate and garnish with cilantro leaves before serving.
